heading: Officer considered for removal: voluntary retirement or discharge
label: 1186 Officer considered for removal: voluntary retirement or discharge
notes: Effective DateSection effective , but the authority to prescribe regulations under this section effective on , see , set out as an Effective Date of 1980 Amendment note under .Sept. 15, 1981Dec. 12, 1980section 701 of Pub. L. 96–513section 101 of this title

children.text: for voluntary retirement, if the officer is qualified for retirement; or
for discharge in accordance with subsection (b)(2).

if eligible for voluntary retirement under any provision of law on the date of such removal, be retired in the grade and with the retired pay for which he would be eligible if retired under such provision; and

children.label: A
children.text: be honorably discharged in the grade then held, in the case of an officer whose case was brought under subsection (a) of ; orsection 1181 of this title

children.label: B
children.text: be discharged in the grade then held, in the case of an officer whose case was brought under subsection (b) of .section 1181 of this title

children.label: c
children.text: An officer who is discharged under subsection (b)(2) is entitled, if eligible therefor, to separation pay under .section 1174(a)(2) of this title
